query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, modelAwaySpread, modelHomeSpread, modelTotal, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, modelRunAt FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-12' AND modelRunAt IS NOT NULL ORDER BY modelRunAt DESC LIMIT 10;
